titleStmt.title: SII 22.54A: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 54. (A.R. No. 54 A of 1906)

summary.p: This is engraved in continuation of the inscription No. 54 above, though it is evidently a separate and different record. It is dated in the 11th year and 169th day of an unspecified king, and registers a grant of land at Ākkūr after its purchase by one Villavarāyar of Perunallūr for 10127 kāśu, for the merit of the reigning king, to provide for the maintenance of persons who were to recite the Vēdas and the Śrī-Rudram in the temple of Tirumayānam-Uḍaiyār at Tirukkaḍavūr. The exact significance of the term vēda-vīṇai is not understood. Perhaps the chanting of the vēdas was accompanied with the music on the vīṇā. Mention is made of two villages Tiruttoṇḍattugai-maṅgalam and Śivapādaśēkhara-maṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . yāṇṭu 10 1 ḷ 100 6 10 9 nuḷampādhirāyaṉ Aṭaippāṉ ciṟu taṉattu māḷikai taṉattut tuṇṭilukku mutalāka paḷḷikaḷ kāṇi māṟi rā[ja*] rā[ja*]pperuvilaiyāka niṉaippiṭṭa nilattu tirukkaṭavūruṭaiyār tirumayāṉamuṭai yār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy nāyaṉār tiru
meṉikku naṉṟāka Ikkoyil vetaviṇai viṇṇappañ ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīrudram viṇṇappañ ceyvārkaḷukkum vetaṅkaḷum pārāyaṇam paṇṇu vārkkum Iṟai mikuti koṟṟukkuṭalākap perunallūruṭaiyān villavarāyar vilai koṇṭu viṭukiṟa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūrāṉa Irājentirasiṅhaccatu rvvetimaṅkalattup piṟinta tiruttoṇṭattukai maṅkalattum civapātacekara maṅkalattum paḷḷi maṉṟiṉāṉ pāṇṭiyarāyap perayaṉaik kāṇimāṟiṉa nilattu vilai matitta kācukku rā[ja*]rā[ja*]purattu Irukka Ivaruṭaṉ karuvattuttuvāci Uḷppaṭa Oṭukkiṉa kācu [100 10 1]2 10 7 Ikkācu patiṉāyirattoru nūṟṟirupat teḻukkum Ivai taṇṭaṟkku viḷat
tūr kiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu . kācu patiṉāyirattoru nūṟṟirupatteḻu .
Digital edition of SII 22.54A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
